global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with promotional text and a call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time flash sale for CrispBox.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'CrispBox' in a bold, modern font, centered at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An abstract shape or design element that does not convey specific information.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: The text 'Flash sale live Only this weekend' is prominently displayed in a large, eye-catching font, centered in the middle of the ad.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Only this weekend

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A rectangular button with rounded edges that reads 'Book now' in a clear, inviting font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is displayed in a bold font, positioned just above the CTA button at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge in the top corner that reads 'SALE' in a contrasting color, drawing attention to the promotional offer.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is displayed in a small font at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
